However, later sources shifted the battle’s date to [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]]. Works published around the same time as Characters, such as ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', instead placed the battle in [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]], which aligns with the timeline presented in [[Empire 8|''Star Wars: Empire'' issue 8]], depicting the mutiny shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. '''Kandji''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] from [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Kandji was close friends with [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]], who had romantic feelings for her. She was kidnapped by [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]] and was [[Death/Legends|killed]] before a rescue party could save her. Biggs kept a [[Hologram/Legends|holo image]] of her in his quarters on the [[Rand Ecliptic/Legends|''Rand Ecliptic'']].

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 9|''Empire'' 9]] {{1st}} {{Hologram}}
